title: Calibrate Python complexity budget for candidate source lifecycle
rawUserRequest: 按用户授权创建独立预算修复 Work Item/PR，提升 governance complexity 的 Python 行上限以覆盖当前已验证的工单 2 代码规模，然后继续工单 2；不启动工单 1 之后的其他工单。

declaredIntent.summary: 将已验证的 Python complexity budget 从 35784 校准到足以覆盖当前 35798 行，同时记录用户授权的 repayment record。

outOfScope: Candidate source lifecycle behavior and release workflow changes
工单 2 之外的功能实现
任何真实发布、Tag 或证据删除

sources.reason: Policy currently rejects the measured 35798 Python lines against max 35784.
Executable budget and repayment validation tests.
Documented Work Item and repayment requirements for threshold changes.
Serial execution plan and explicit budget repair authorization context.

riskAssessment.reason: The measured current Python line count and the policy maximum are known; the change is limited to one policy value and its repayment record.

executionDecision.reason: The user explicitly authorized an independent budget repair Work Item/PR.

preReviewWarnings: Confirm the new maximum is the smallest bounded increase that covers the measured line count and has a repayment record.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The policy contains a repayment record naming the prior limit, new limit, user authority, date, and concrete repayment plan.
Governance complexity tests pass with the calibrated policy and no unrelated files change.
guidelines: Keep threshold changes bounded and backed by a repayment record.
Do not change implementation or historical evidence outside the declared policy scope.

intent.problem: The full quality run measured 35798 Python lines while the current policy maximum is 35784, causing governance complexity tests to fail before Work Item 2 can be archived.
constraints: Change only the governance complexity policy and its auditable repayment record.
Use the smallest bounded increase that covers the measured line count.
Do not start another plan Work Item.
intent.rationale: A separate calibrated budget PR preserves one-Work-Item/one-PR ownership and makes the budget exception reviewable.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: measured Python line count is within the calibrated limit
repayment metadata is complete and attributable

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized an independent budget repair Work Item/PR.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
